name: Performapal Swincobra
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＥＭ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エンタメイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ブランコブラ
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
Once per turn, when a monster you control inflicts battle damage to your opponent: You can send the top card of your opponent's Deck to the Graveyard.

[ Monster Effect ] 
This card can attack your opponent directly. If this card attacks, it is changed to Defense Position at the end of the Battle Phase.
pend_eff: Once per turn, when a monster you control inflicts battle damage to your opponent: You can send the top card of your opponent's Deck to the Graveyard.

action: Sends from the top of your opponent's Deck to your opponent's Graveyard
misc: At the end of the Battle Phase
